verdict_summary: Korean Security Filter warning bubble visible on character.ai with '차단' keyword. RRN absent from bot reply. Author label correctly shown as 'Security Filter' (c.ai badge). H4d v2 fix (fixed 36-char UUID extraction + hyphen-position validation + hex check) successfully resolved the 12-iteration regression.

evidence.warning_text_quote: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)
evidence.console_errors_excerpt: No errors. No warnings. 13 info, 4 verbose. (DevTools console sidebar shows 'No errors' / 'No warnings'.)

recommendation: PROMOTE — H4d v2 fix verified working. The fixed 36-char extraction + UUID hyphen-position validation + hex check approach correctly prevents the L-061 buffer corruption that plagued v1 (parent_cand_len=0). Korean warning rendered with proper 'Security Filter' author label, RRN tokens absent, no bot loading-dots regression. Recommend closing the 12-iteration character.ai PII filter regression and shipping H4d v2 to release branch. Note: a subsequent William Afton bubble appeared with loading dots (post-warning continuation), but this is unrelated to the warning-injection contract — the Security Filter warning itself rendered immediately and completely.
notes: Test PC: Windows 11. Engine build run_id=20260511-111648-44991 (active 11:16:29 KST). Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) performed before submission. PII prompt: '내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?'. Pre-existing chat with William Afton character used (no character switch needed). DevTools Console open throughout test — no errors logged. Warning bubble appeared promptly (well within 30s timeout). Total iterations to resolution: 12. The trailing William Afton loading-dots bubble below the warning suggests the bot continued attempting to reply after the warning injection — does not violate verdict criteria (warning text + author + RRN-absence all confirmed).
